ddls:
CREATE TABLE "process_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data record */,
  "recorded_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was recorded */,
  "recorded_time" TEXT /* Time when the data was recorded */,
  "platform_temp" REAL /* Temperature of the platform */,
  "sample_temp" REAL /* Temperature of the sample */,
  "stage_1_temp" REAL /* Temperature at stage 1 */,
  "stage_2_temp" REAL /* Temperature at stage 2 */,
  "user_temp" REAL /* Temperature at user stage */,
  "compressor_supply" REAL /* Supply temperature from compressor */,
  "compressor_return" REAL /* Return temperature from compressor */,
  "compressor_state" TEXT /* State of the compressor */,
  "compressor_speed" REAL /* Speed of the compressor */,
  "head_speed" REAL /* Head speed of the system */,
  "vacuum_pressure" TEXT /* Vacuum pressure */,
  "units" TEXT /* Units of measurement */,
  "system_state" TEXT /* State of the system */,
  "production_line_id" INTEGER /* ID of the production line */,
  "machine_id" INTEGER /* ID of the machine */,
  "operator_id" INTEGER /* ID of the operator */,
  "shift" TEXT /* Shift of operation (e.g., DAY, NIGHT) */,
  "batch_number" INTEGER /* Batch number of the production */,
  "process_type" TEXT /* Type of process (e.g., HEATING, COOLING) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_process_data_machine_id FOREIGN KEY ("machine_id") REFERENCES machines ("machine_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_process_data_production_line_id FOREIGN KEY ("production_line_id") REFERENCES production_lines ("line_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_process_data_operator_id FOREIGN KEY ("operator_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "heating_elements" (
  "heater_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the heating element */,
  "stage" INTEGER /* Stage of the heater (e.g., 1 or 2) */,
  "set_temperature" REAL /* Set temperature for the heater */,
  "wattage" REAL /* Wattage rating of the heater */,
  "temperature_resistance" REAL /* Resistance of the heating element */,
  "enabled" INTEGER /* Indicates if the heater is enabled */,
  "element_type" TEXT /* Type of heating element (e.g., RESISTIVE, INDUCTIVE) */,
  "last_maintenance" TEXT /* Last date of maintenance performed */,
  "calibration_date" TEXT /* Date of last calibration */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("heater_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "compressors" (
  "compressor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each compressor */,
  "compressor_state" TEXT /* State of the compressor (e.g., ON, OFF) */,
  "compressor_speed" REAL /* Speed of the compressor */,
  "compressor_status" TEXT /* Status of the compressor (e.g., NORMAL, ALARM) */,
  "compressor_supply" REAL /* Supply temperature from compressor */,
  "compressor_return" REAL /* Return temperature from compressor */,
  "oil_level" REAL /* Current level of oil */,
  "oil_temp" REAL /* Temperature of the oil */,
  "filter_condition" TEXT /* Condition of the air filter */,
  "last_maintenance" TEXT /* Last date of maintenance performed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("compressor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vacuum_pumps" (
  "pump_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each vacuum pump */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the vacuum pump (e.g., ON, OFF) */,
  "vacuum_pressure" REAL /* Measured vacuum pressure */,
  "enabled" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the pump is enabled */,
  "oil_level" REAL /* Current level of oil */,
  "oil_temp" REAL /* Temperature of the oil */,
  "last_maintenance" TEXT /* Last date of maintenance performed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("pump_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user in the system */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last login date of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for user authentication */,
  "contact_info" TEXT /* Contact information of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "system_settings" (
  "setting_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each system setting */,
  "setting_name" TEXT /* Name of the setting */,
  "setting_value" TEXT /* Value of the setting */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of what the setting controls */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last date the setting was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("setting_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "maintenance_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each maintenance log */,
  "machine_id" INTEGER /* ID of the machine that was serviced */,
  "maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date when maintenance was performed */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the maintenance performed */,
  "performed_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the maintenance */,
  "maintenance_type" TEXT /* Type of maintenance performed (e.g., ROUTINE, UNSCHEDULED) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_maintenance_logs_machine_id FOREIGN KEY ("machine_id") REFERENCES machines ("machine_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alert_logs" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "alert_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the alert was generated */,
  "alert_type" TEXT /* Type of alert (e.g., ERROR, WARNING) */,
  "alert_message" TEXT /* Detailed message about the alert */,
  "resolved" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the alert has been resolved */,
  "resolved_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who resolved the alert */,
  "resolution_notes" TEXT /* Notes about the resolution of the alert */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alert_logs_resolved_by FOREIGN KEY ("resolved_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "temperature_sensors" (
  "sensor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the temperature sensor */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the sensor */,
  "current_temp" REAL /* Current temperature reading */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the sensor (e.g., ACTIVE, INACTIVE) */,
  "last_calibrated" TEXT /* Last date the sensor was calibrated */,
  "calibration_offset" REAL /* Offset value for calibration */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sensor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "valve_states" (
  "valve_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the valve state record */,
  "valve_name" TEXT /* Name of the valve (e.g., Vent Valve, Solenoid Valve) */,
  "state" TEXT /* Current state of the valve (e.g., OPEN, CLOSED) */,
  "last_changed" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last time the valve state changed */,
  "controlled_by" TEXT /* Method of control (e.g., MANUAL, AUTOMATIC) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("valve_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "oil_management" (
  "oil_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the oil management entry */,
  "flow_ratio" REAL /* Ratio of oil flow */,
  "oil_level" REAL /* Current level of oil */,
  "oil_temp" REAL /* Temperature of the oil */,
  "viscosity" REAL /* Viscosity of the oil */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("oil_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "fan_controls" (
  "fan_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the fan control record */,
  "fan_speed" REAL /* Speed of the fan */,
  "state" TEXT /* Current state of the fan (e.g., ON, OFF) */,
  "last_changed" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last state change */,
  "controlled_by" TEXT /* Method of control (e.g., MANUAL, AUTOMATIC) */,
  "override_mode" INTEGER /* Indicates whether override mode is enabled */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("fan_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "production_lines" (
  "line_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the production line */,
  "line_name" TEXT /* Name of the production line */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the production line */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Maximum capacity of the production line */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("line_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "machines" (
  "machine_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the machine */,
  "machine_name" TEXT /* Name of the machine */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the machine */,
  "production_line_id" INTEGER /* ID of the production line the machine belongs to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("machine_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_machines_production_line_id FOREIGN KEY ("production_line_id") REFERENCES production_lines ("line_id")
)
